verses.1: Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth.
verses.2: Serve the LORD with gladness; come into His presence with joyful songs.
verses.3: Know that the LORD is God. It is He who made us, and we are His; we are His people, and the sheep of His pasture.
verses.4: Enter His gates with thanksgiving and His courts with praise; give thanks to Him and bless His name.
verses.5: For the LORD is good, and His loving devotion endures forever; His faithfulness continues to all generations.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
